full_quote:
I worked with Kyle on an interesting project. When we cooperated, he was always full of passion and creativity. We could talk for hours about how to display information on maps, and he always gave great advice. I was lucky to work with him.
After the project, he also gave me excellent suggestions on design thinking and methodology, including suggesting many books and articles that he thinks were good for me. He is a great coach for me and I look forward to working with him again in the future.
name: Wendy Wang

title: Senior Product Manager
